prompt: A professional 4K VR UI mockup for Edumy e-learning. A large floating holographic World Space Canvas in a futuristic dark VR classroom with blue neon accents. Split layout: Left 45% has a glowing vertical 16:9 high-res coding course thumbnail (laptop and code). Right 55% has a scrollable list of course rows. Each row: bold white title, description line, green progress bar, and a vibrant 'Continue' button. Top header: 'My Courses' with a sleek search bar. Bottom bar: minimalist 'Back' and 'Settings' buttons. Cyber-learning aesthetic, glassmorphism, dark mode, high contrast, particle glow. Front-on perspective. Minimalist and immersive.
